title: Fruits of the Spirit

sections.label: Intro
lines: Oh, the seeds are sown in love divine,
In the garden of the heart, they shine.

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Love is the root, it binds us strong,
Joy lifts the weary with its song.
Peace like a river, calm and wide,
Patience walks slow, standing by our side.

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: In every season, through storm and strife,
These fruits bloom bright in the soul of life.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Love, joy, peace, and patience grow,
Kindness and goodness overflow.
Faithfulness stands through the longest night,
Gentleness and self-control shine bright.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Kindness whispers in the quiet place,
Goodness reflects in each tender face.
Faithfulness holds when the world turns cold,
Gentleness comforts, steady and bold.

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: The Spirit’s gifts, a sacred design,
A tapestry woven in hearts aligned.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Love, joy, peace, and patience grow,
Kindness and goodness overflow.
Faithfulness stands through the longest night,
Gentleness and self-control shine bright.

sections.label: Bridge
lines: In the quiet soil of humility,
The Spirit plants seeds of eternity.
Harvesting a love so true,
The fruits of the Spirit carry us through.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Love, joy, peace, and patience grow,
Kindness and goodness overflow.
Faithfulness stands through the longest night,
Gentleness and self-control shine bright.

sections.label: Outro
lines: Oh, the seeds are sown in love divine,
In the garden of the heart, they shine.

epigraph: But the fruit of the Spirit is love
styleNote: Gentle Fingerstyle Guitar · Fingerstyle Guitar Continues · Fingerstyle Guitar Fades Softly
